data.title: Tesla Registrations Tumble 64% In UK In October Even As Overall EV Registrations Rise
data.description: EV giant Tesla's car registrations dropped by a steep 64% in October as compared to the corresponding period last year, according to industry data.

data.title: Baidu Takes on Tesla, Secures License To Test Self-Driving Tech in Hong Kong
data.description: Baidu, Inc (NASDAQ: BIDU) obtains Hong Kong license for testing self-driving cars, marking expansion efforts outside China. Baidu also reports Q3 earnings.
